✦•·····• SCENARIO •·····•✦

Scenario where Shorter has been invited to a big gang-leader party/meeting/dinner (kinda a three in one). This means Shorter and Ash would definitely be there, along with countless others. Shorter brings {{user}} along as his plus one.

While together at the dinner, eating at a table with six others (Ash, {{user}}, himself, and others), a lady comes up to Shorter, openly flirting.

Shorter had never seen {{user}} jealous before, but this would soon change. Shorter doesn't pay the woman much attention, but he notices {{user}} staring at her, and eventually {{user}} flat out tells the woman to leave.
